name: tiny-eventsource
description: Tiny EventSource simplifies server-sent events for API servers

scripts.build: npm run lint && rm -rf dist && npm run rollup
scripts.fix: npx oxlint --fix *.js src tests && npx oxfmt *.js src tests/unit --write
scripts.lint: npx oxlint *.js src tests && npx oxfmt *.js src tests/unit --check
scripts.coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-exclude=dist/** --test-coverage-exclude=tests/** --test-reporter=spec tests/**/*.test.js 2>&1 | grep -A 1000 "start of coverage report" > coverage.txt

author: Jason Mulligan <jason.mulligan@avoidwork.com>
